repository.name: ai-job-hunter-app
repository.description: Local-first AI desktop assistant that scrapes job boards, matches roles to your resume, and auto-generates resumes & cover letters. Offline with Ollama, BYO API key, or route it through an AI CLI agent (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI).

head_commit.message:
refactor: convert landing how-it-works to tsx and remove raw-html pipeline (PR3/3) (#881)

* refactor: port landing how-it-works page to tsx

HowItWorksBody 1:1 port of the docs-tier page (sidebar tab nav, six
js-populated view panels, legend) reusing BackLink and SiteFooter; css moved
verbatim with only the stale wrapper comment reworded; frozen three-file
injection order preserved. diff-dom gains colon-space normalization inside
style declarations (react ssr emits prop:value; this page's baseline is the
only one written prop: value) with a regression test. The overview lede
avoids an entity in the tag-adjacent text run — next's jsx transform drops
the leading space after an inline tag when the same run carries an entity,
which shipped as a joined word until the review's byte-level audit caught it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: remove landing raw-html content pipeline

RawHtml and readContent had no consumers left after the how-it-works port —
deleted along with the emptied src/content tree. The react/no-danger eslint
exemption shrinks to PageStyle alone and the dead content ignore glob is
dropped; marketing-base's provenance comment now speaks in past tense.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: adr-0018 addendum for the landing tsx conversion

Records the raw-html pipeline retirement across the three prs, the curated
frozen parity href list, the diff-dom verification and its documented
inline-word-gap blind spot with the compensating checks, and the fonts
hoist; re-points adr-0019's body.html reference at HomeBody.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: pin diff-dom url colon edge and drop stale ignore comment

Review-ensemble consensus nits: the ignores comment still described the
deleted src/content glob, and normalizeDeclaration's documented data-uri
first-colon behavior had no regression case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: repoint landing drift guard and secret scan at the tsx sources

The drift guard read the deleted src/content/how-it-works/body.html
(pre-push ENOENT) — now reads HowItWorksBody.tsx; extraction regexes scan
raw text and needed no change (probe line trips all four checks). The
secret scan's five body.html entries had been silently no-op behind an
existsSync guard since the deletions began — repointed at the eleven real
authored tsx/shared sources, and a listed-but-missing file is now a hard
failure instead of a silent skip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
